candidateFamilies.summary: Promote stable engineering constraints, repository preferences, and lasting quality expectations into memory.
candidateFamilies.rationale: Only coding facts that repeatedly survive review, verification, and closeout should become memory.

candidateFamilies.summary: Promote repeatable implementation, review, verification, and closeout methods into reusable skills.
candidateFamilies.rationale: Coding methods become skills only when they repeatedly improve delivery quality without depending on one repository state.

candidateFamilies.summary: Promote stable intake, quality-gate, and closeout improvements into runtime update proposals.
candidateFamilies.rationale: When the pack repeatedly learns a better way to admit, verify, or close work, that change belongs in runtime discipline rather than ad hoc prompts.
